messages.content:
What was the name of Mahashweta Devi’s first Novel?
1 point
a. Jhansir rani
b. Alma Mater
c. Great Britain
d. None of these
a. Jhansir rani

In which language was "Kanyadan" originally written?
1 point
a. Hindi
b. Bengali
c. Marathi
d. Englis
c. Marathi

___was the original Grand English translation.
1 point
A. Bhagavath Gita
B.  Bible
C.  Wycliffe Bible
D.  Cry the peacock
C. Wycliffe Bible

No two languages are ever sufficiently similar to be considered as representing the ____social reality.
1 point
A. Different
B. Same
C. Contrast
D. Divergent
B. Same

__ plays an important role in Translation.
1 point
A. Country
B. Culture
C. Tradition
D.  People
B. Culture

___ represents some changes occurring in a translation process.
1 point
A. Equivalence
B.  Loss
C.  Shift
D.  Gain
C. Shift

Which year did Bhisham Sahni receive the Padma Bhushan Award?
1 point
a. 1987
b. 1990
c. 1994
d. 2001

Who is the central character of the play Aadhe Adhure?
1 point
a. Savitri
b. Kinni
c. Binni
d. Ashok
a. Savitri

In which languages was Amrita’s work translated into?
1 point
a. English & French
b. Dutch & Japanese
c. Danish & Mandarin
d. All of the above
a. English & French

The Jewish Bible, the old testament was originally written almost entirely in ___.
1 point
A. Hindi
B. Tamil
C. Hebrew
D. Norton
C. Hebrew

Which translation is also called direct translation or close translation ?
1 point
A. Free translation
B. Literal translation
C. Grammar translation
D. None of the above
B. Literal translation

Poetry and Translation adopts a/an creative outlook towards poetry translation.
1 point
A. Negative
B. Pessimistic
C. Optimistic
D. Wrong
C. Optimistic

___ is the translation of novels, essays, fiction, short stories, comedy folktale, hagiography, works of Criticism, science fiction etc.
1 point
A. Greek translation
B. Prose translation
C. Aramaic translation
D. Norse translation
B. Prose translation

81___has to be admitted as a vast reservoir of translation Contemporary India.
1 point
A. Hindi
B. English
C. Bengali
D. Tamil
A. Hindi

In the beginning of the play Kanyadan, Seva is returning from?
1 point
a. Ahmednagar
b. Ahmedabad
c. Aurangabad
d. Amritsar
b. Ahmedabad

The problems of equivalence arises primarily in translating, ____.
1 point
A. Poems
B. Plays
C. Fiction
D. Idioms
D. Idioms

At what age did Amrita Pritam publish her first book of poems?
1 point
a. 11 years
b. 22 years
c. 16 years
d. 31 year
b. 22 years

Who are Kunjuras in the story The hunt?
1 point
a. Whole sale fruit buyers at Tohri market
b. Whole sale Timber buyers at Tohri Market
c. Whole sale fruit buyers at Karuda
d. Whole sale Timber buyers at Karuda
a. Whole sale fruit buyers at Tohri market

Aadhe Adhure by Mohan Rakesh translated version in English is named?
1 point
a. Half Journey
b. Halfway House
c. Half Incomplete
d. None of these
b. Halfway House

In which year Indian post released a commemorative postage stamp to honour Sahni?
1 point
a. 2015
b. 2017
c. 2018
d. 2019
